purpose: Transform consented human feedback and curated exemplars into reviewable distillation candidates without granting automatic promotion authority.

steps.description: Read HFEvent and CurationRecord inputs from the governed community stream.
Reject inputs that lack consent, license, lineage, or rubric evidence.
Group accepted examples into candidate training or evaluation slices with provenance preserved.
Produce a distillation candidate record for downstream evaluation; do not promote automatically.
Emit candidate artifacts, provenance references, and gate status for review.

claim_boundary: This workflow is a contract stub only. It does not execute training, modify models, or promote artifacts.
notes: Runtime implementation should bind to the community schemas and SHACL gates before any distillation execution.
